name: Grilled Flank Steak w/ Tomato Ginger Vinagrette
recipeIngredient: 6 Cloves garlic, finely chopped and divided
1 can (14 1.5-ounce) DEL MONTE FreshCut Diced Tomatoes, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 2/3 cup oil, 5 cloves garlic, 1 tablespoon balsamic vinegar, lemon juice, 2 tablespoons ginger, and soy sauce in a shallow baking dish. Add steak, turning to coat. Cover and refrigerate overnight, turning occasionally.
2. Drain tomatoes, reserving tomatoes and juice separately.
3. Combine remaining 1/3 cup oil, 1 clove garlic, 3 tablespoons balsamic vinegar, 1 1/2 tablespoons ginger, salt, barbecue sauce, and reserved tomato juice in a container of an electric blender. Cover and process until smooth.
4. Pour into a bowl; add reserved tomatoes. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Place steak on cooking grate; grill over medium-hot coals (350°F to 400°F) 7 to 8 minutes on each side or to desired degree of doneness.
6. Cut steak diagonally across grain into thin strips; serve with tomato mixture.
